name: @xiigen/event-management
description: FLOW-03 event-management — organiser-facing event creation, registration, promotion, analytics (T59-T62). Portability artifact declaring cross-flow co-install relationships.
coInstallNotes: FLOW-03 stands alone for its 4 services (T59-T62). FLOW-04 depends on FLOW-03 (see docs/sessions/FLOW-04/). The reverse relationship (FLOW-03 requires FLOW-04) does NOT exist — FLOW-03 emits EventCreated via the queue fabric; delivery is fire-and-forget. Circular co-install runtime test: server/test/event-management/phase-03-circular-install.spec.ts proves FLOW-03 services boot without any FLOW-04 service present.
